name: Greg Davies
bio: Greg Davies is a Welsh-born English comedian, actor and writer who spent thirteen years as a secondary-school drama teacher before turning to stand-up in 2005. He broke through as the acerbic Mr Gilbert in The Inbetweeners and later built a touring stand-up career drawing heavily on his teaching years. He is widely known as the host of the panel game Taskmaster.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up on the club circuit
Cast as Mr Gilbert in The Inbetweeners
Debut solo show Firing Cheeseballs at a Dog
Netflix special You Magnificent Beast released

accolades: Edinburgh Comedy Award nomination for Firing Cheeseballs at a Dog (2010)
Chortle Award for Best Tour, You Magnificent Beast (2018)
BAFTA Television nomination for Best Male Comedy Performance (2013)

specials.t: The Back of My Mums Head
